description_long: This spice rack features a rectangular wooden base with a rich, dark brown finish and a subtle wood grain texture. Four white, bell-shaped spice containers are evenly spaced along the top, each with a rounded cap and a slightly domed top. The containers are set into individual recesses in the base, providing stability and a clean, organized appearance. A small, light-colored emblem or inlay is visible on one corner of the base, adding a decorative touch. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with smooth surfaces and no visible handles or openings on the containers. The rack is compact and appears suitable for placement on a kitchen countertop or shelf.
description: A compact wooden spice rack with four white, bell-shaped containers set into a dark brown rectangular base, featuring a decorative emblem.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four white spice containers evenly spaced on the dark wooden base, with a decorative emblem visible on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the aligned arrangement of the containers and the depth of the wooden base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the containers and the uninterrupted wood grain of the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the containers' alignment and the base's shape.
